creator: freebsd-announce@chthonic.com
text:
portupgrade -a 'tracker*' bombs:

grep: /usr/local/lib/libproxy.la: No such file or directory
sed: /usr/local/lib/libproxy.la: No such file or directory
gnome-libtool: link: `/usr/local/lib/libproxy.la' is not a valid libtool archive
gmake[4]: *** [libextract-playlist.la] Error 1
gmake[4]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/sysutils/tracker-client/work/tracker-0.6.95/src/tracker-extract'
gmake[3]: *** [all] Error 2
gmake[3]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/sysutils/tracker-client/work/tracker-0.6.95/src/tracker-extract'
gmake[2]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/sysutils/tracker-client/work/tracker-0.6.95/src'
gmake[1]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/sysutils/tracker-client/work/tracker-0.6.95'
gmake: *** [all] Error 2
*** Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/sysutils/tracker-client.
** Command failed [exit code 1]: /usr/bin/script -qa /tmp/portupgrade20110908-69395-74pzfa-0 env UPGRADE_TOOL=portupgrade UPGRADE_PORT=tracker-client-0.6.95_11 UPGRADE_PORT_VER=0.6.95_11 make
** Fix the problem and try again.
** Listing the failed packages (-:ignored / *:skipped / !:failed)
        ! sysutils/tracker-client (tracker-client-0.6.95_11)    (unknown build error)

How-To-Repeat: Run portupgrade if one uses tracker-client.
